title: Fruit crumble

insSteps: Cut the fruit into pieces (you can keep some of the peel for a rustic look).
In a bowl, combine the flour, oats, sugar, and butter.

Mix with your fingers or a fork until the mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs — there should be some big chunks included. Add a little water if the mixture is too dry. Do not add more flour. Spread this crumbly mixture over the fruit.
Bake for about 30–35 minutes, until golden brown.

notes: If using frozen fruits, make sure to throughly thaw them and drain excess liquid before using to prevent the crumble from becoming too watery.
